name: Context7
description: MCP server that injects current, version-specific library docs and code examples into your LLM context — eliminating outdated training data from coding assistants.

skills.name: Library Resolution
skills.description: Resolve a library name to its canonical documentation source ID automatically

skills.name: Fetch Docs
skills.description: Retrieve up-to-date library documentation filtered to a specific version string

skills.name: Topic Search
skills.description: Search within a library's docs for a specific function, class, or programming concept

skills.name: Multi-Library Context
skills.description: Inject docs from multiple libraries into a single LLM context for cross-library tasks

skills.name: MCP Native
skills.description: Works out of the box with Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf, and any MCP-compatible IDE
